preamble: Mid-central vowel iotation involves the transition from the vowel [ʌ] to a palatal glide [j].

examples.note: Uncommon development, usually limited to specific phonological environments.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
